message:
refactor: migrate Session save-path metadata to asupersync async filesystem

Replace std::fs::metadata with asupersync::fs::metadata in the session
JSONL append path's entry-size estimation logic, converting to async
(.await). Aligns with the ongoing Asupersync filesystem migration for
the session persistence layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
